title: Fed holds rates steady but with highest level of dissent since 1992
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The Federal Reserve held rates steady in a range of 3.5%-3.75% with the highest level of dissent since 1992, with four officials dissenting, including three aga
excerpt: The Federal Reserve held rates steady in a range of 3.5%-3.75% with the highest level of dissent since 1992, with four officials dissenting, including three against easing and one for a cut. Traders expected no rate cuts in 2026. The decision was the most divided since 1992.

body: CNBC (@CNBC). 38 likes 15 replies. Fed holds rates steady but with highest level of dissent since 1992.
The Fed held its key interest rate steady in a range between 3.5%-3.75%. Here are the details: cnb.cx/4ddD6Rs.
